problem_text_cn:
三、(16分)
水平光滑大桌面上，平放着一个内、外半径几乎同为$R$的绝缘圆环，$P_1OP_2$是环的一条直径.环内有一个质量为$m$、电量$q>0$的小球，小球在环内的运动位置可用图示的方位角$\theta$表示，小球与双壁之间光滑接触.设空间有竖直向上的匀强磁场，磁感应强度为$B$.通过某种机制让圆环在桌面上沿着与直径$P_1OP_2$垂直朝右的方向作持续的匀速运动，速度大小$u=3qBR/4m$.设小球开始时位于$P_2$位置，相对圆环具有水平朝右的初速度.初速度大小取某些值时，都可使小球在而后的运动途径中会出现受环壁作用力$N=0$的角位置，对应地导致小球在$\theta=3\pi/2$角位置处受环壁作用力大小$N$也有不同的值，试求其中最大者$N_{\max}$.
problem_text_en:
Three. (16 points)
On a horizontal smooth tabletop, a thin insulating ring with inner and outer radii almost equal to $R$ is placed flat, with $P_1OP_2$ being one of its diameters. Inside the ring, there is a small ball of mass $m$ and charge $q>0$, whose position can be described by the azimuthal angle $\theta$ as shown. The ball contacts the ring wall smoothly. A uniform magnetic field $B$ is present vertically upward. By some mechanism, the ring moves persistently at a constant speed $u=3qBR/4m$ on the tabletop, perpendicular to the diameter $P_1OP_2$. Initially, the ball is at position $P_2$, having a horizontal initial velocity to the right relative to the ring. When the initial velocity takes certain values, there will be angular positions where the ball experiences zero normal force $N=0$ from the ring wall during its subsequent motion. Correspondingly, the magnitude of the normal force $N$ experienced by the ball at $\theta=3\pi/2$ will also vary. Determine the maximum value of $N$, denoted as $N_{\max}$.
problem_solution_cn:
## 三、(16分)

将小球在环内任意$\theta$角位置相对桌面速度$v$分解为
$$ v=u+v'(\theta),\quad v'(\theta):\text{小球相对环的速度} $$
小球受洛伦兹力$F$也可分解成
$$ F=qv\times B=qu\times B+qv'\times B, $$
其中
$$ qu\times B\left\{\begin{matrix}\text{沿直径}P_1OP_2,\text{从}P_1\text{到}P_2\text{的方向},\\ \text{大小为}qB.\end{matrix}\right. $$
桌面将此力交给圆环参考系(也是惯性系)，在该系中此力具有类重力特性:
$$ quB=mg',\quad \omega'=\frac{quB}{m}=\frac{3q^2B^2}{4m^2}. $$
圆环系中，取过$P_2$与直径$P_1OP_2$垂直的方位线作为类重力势能零位，则任意$\theta$角方位的类重力势能为
$$ E_v(\theta)=mg'h(\theta),\quad h(\theta)=R(1-\cos\theta). $$
桌面系为圆环系算得
$$ qv'\times B_i $$
在圆环系中径向朝外或朝里，不作功。
因此，小球在圆环系中“机械能”守恒，小球相对圆环参考系的运动，可类比为小球在重力场中竖直固定光滑圆环内的运动。
小球在环内某处受环壁作用力为零，要求
$$ \begin{cases}-mg'\cos\theta-qv'B=F_{\phi}=0,\\ \text{可取的角位置：}\frac{3}{2}\geq\theta\geq\frac{\pi}{2}.\end{cases} $$
参考题解图，改取新的角参量：
$$ \phi=\theta-\frac{\pi}{2},\quad\Rightarrow\quad \pi\geq\phi\geq0. $$
<pFig></pFig><quad><pos_41><pos_396><pos_236><pos_480></quad>
<pFig></pFig><quad><pos_42><pos_485><pos_937><pos_510></quad>
据(1)$\phi$越接近$\pi/2$，$\sin\phi$越大，由二次方程求根公式可知$v'$越大.
据(2)$v'$越大和$\sin\phi$越大，则$v_0$越大，最大者记为$v_{0,\max}$.
$\phi=\pi/2$，$\sin\phi=1$时，$v_0=v_{0,\max}$ (与此相应，小球将逆时针单向运动)：
(1)式，$\Rightarrow\quad v'^{2}+\frac{qBR}{m}v'=\frac{R}{m}quB=0,\quad\Rightarrow\quad v'=qBR/2m$，
(2)式，$\Rightarrow\quad\frac{1}{2}mv_{0,\max}^{2}=\frac{1}{2}mv'^{2}+mg'\cdot 2R,\quad\Rightarrow\quad v_{0,\max}=\sqrt{13}qBR/2m$. (10分)
$\theta=3\pi/2$，即$\phi=\pi$处，因$mg'\sin\phi=0$，$N$未必指向环心，对可能取到的$v_{\phi}$，有
$$ N=\left|\pm qu'B+m\frac{v'^{2}}{R}\right|,\qquad(3) $$
(4)
$$ \frac{1}{2}mv'^{2}=\frac{1}{2}mv_0'^{2}-mg'R,\quad\text{且}v'\text{越大},N\text{越大}. $$
据(4)$v_0$越大，$v'$越大，据(3)：小球逆时针运动，$N$大，且$v'$越大，$N$越大.即得
$$ \frac{1}{2}mv'^{2}=\frac{1}{2}mv_{0,\max}^{2}-mg'R,\quad N_{\max}=qv'B+m\frac{v'^{2}}{R}, $$
可解得
$$ v'=\sqrt{\frac{\pi}{2}}qBR/2m,\quad N_{\max}=\frac{2\sqrt{\pi}q^{2}B^{2}}{4}\frac{m}{m}.\qquad(6分) $$
problem_solution_en:
## Three. (16 points)

Decompose the ball’s velocity $v$ relative to the tabletop at an arbitrary angular position $\theta$ as
$$ v=u+v'(\theta),\quad v'(\theta):\text{ball’s velocity relative to the ring}. $$
The Lorentz force on the ball can be similarly decomposed:
$$ F=qv\times B=qu\times B+qv'\times B, $$
where
$$ qu\times B\left\{\begin{matrix}\text{along diameter }P_1OP_2,\text{ from }P_1\text{ to }P_2,\\ \text{magnitude }qB.\end{matrix}\right. $$
The table imparts this force to the ring reference frame (also inertial), in which it behaves like a gravity‑like force:
$$ quB=mg',\quad \omega'=\frac{quB}{m}=\frac{3q^2B^2}{4m^2}. $$
In the ring frame, taking the line through $P_2$ perpendicular to the diameter $P_1OP_2$ as the zero of the gravity‑like potential, the potential at an angle $\theta$ is
$$ E_v(\theta)=mg'h(\theta),\quad h(\theta)=R(1-\cos\theta). $$
The term $qv'\times B_i$ computed in the ring frame is radial (outward or inward) and does no work.
Hence, the “mechanical energy” of the ball is conserved in the ring frame; the motion of the ball relative to the ring is analogous to the motion of a ball inside a fixed smooth vertical ring in a gravitational field.
The condition for zero normal force from the wall at some point is
$$ \begin{cases}-mg'\cos\theta-qv'B=F_{\phi}=0,\\ \text{admissible angular positions: }\frac{3}{2}\geq\theta\geq\frac{\pi}{2}.\end{cases} $$
Referring to the solution figure, introduce a new angular parameter:
$$ \phi=\theta-\frac{\pi}{2},\quad\Rightarrow\quad \pi\geq\phi\geq0. $$
<pFig></pFig><quad><pos_41><pos_396><pos_236><pos_480></quad>
<pFig></pFig><quad><pos_42><pos_485><pos_937><pos_510></quad>
From (1), the closer $\phi$ is to $\pi/2$, the larger $\sin\phi$ is, and the quadratic root formula shows that $v'$ is larger.
From (2), the larger $v'$ and $\sin\phi$ are, the larger $v_0$ is; denote the maximum as $v_{0,\max}$.
When $\phi=\pi/2$, $\sin\phi=1$, we have $v_0=v_{0,\max}$ (correspondingly, the ball will move counter‑clockwise unidirectionally):
From (1), $\Rightarrow\quad v'^{2}+\frac{qBR}{m}v'=\frac{R}{m}quB=0,\quad\Rightarrow\quad v'=qBR/2m$,
From (2), $\Rightarrow\quad\frac{1}{2}mv_{0,\max}^{2}=\frac{1}{2}mv'^{2}+mg'\cdot 2R,\quad\Rightarrow\quad v_{0,\max}=\sqrt{13}qBR/2m$. (10 points)
At $\theta=3\pi/2$, i.e. $\phi=\pi$, because $mg'\sin\phi=0$, $N$ need not point toward the centre; for attainable $v_{\phi}$ we have
$$ N=\left|\pm qu'B+m\frac{v'^{2}}{R}\right|,\qquad(3) $$
(4)
$$ \frac{1}{2}mv'^{2}=\frac{1}{2}mv_0'^{2}-mg'R,\quad\text{and larger }v'\text{ gives larger }N. $$
From (4), larger $v_0$ gives larger $v'$; from (3): for counter‑clockwise motion, $N$ is large, and larger $v'$ gives larger $N$. Therefore,
$$ \frac{1}{2}mv'^{2}=\frac{1}{2}mv_{0,\max}^{2}-mg'R,\quad N_{\max}=qv'B+m\frac{v'^{2}}{R}, $$
which can be solved to yield
$$ v'=\sqrt{\frac{\pi}{2}}qBR/2m,\quad N_{\max}=\frac{2\sqrt{\pi}q^{2}B^{2}}{4}\frac{m}{m}.\qquad(6\,\text{points}) $$
img_cn: 水平光滑大桌面上，平放着一个内、外半径几乎同为$R$的绝缘圆环，$P_1OP_2$是环的一条直径.环内有一个质量为$m$、电量$q>0$的小球，小球在环内的运动位置可用图示的方位角$\theta$表示，小球与双壁之间光滑接触.设空间有竖直向上的匀强磁场，磁感应强度为$B$.通过某种机制让圆环在桌面上沿着与直径$P_1OP_2$垂直朝右的方向作持续的匀速运动，速度大小$u=3qBR/4m$.设小球开始时位于$P_2$位置，相对圆环具有水平朝右的初速度.初速度大小取某些值时，都可使小球在而后的运动途径中会出现受环壁作用力$N=0$的角位置，对应地导致小球在$\theta=3\pi/2$角位置处受环壁作用力大小$N$也有不同的值，试求其中最大者$N_{\max}$.
图片展示了物理竞赛辅导题的解题过程。上方是关于小球在环内受洛伦兹力的分析，包括力的分解、类重力势能的设定，以及机械能守恒的条件推导。下方有两张配图，左侧是小球受力示意图，右侧是带公式的说明。底部有2010年暑期物理竞赛辅导班联谊试题的字样及页码。
img_en: A thin insulating ring with inner and outer radii almost equal to $R$ lies flat on a horizontal smooth tabletop. $P_1OP_2$ is a diameter of the ring. Inside the ring, a small ball of mass $m$ and charge $q>0$ moves; its position is described by the azimuthal angle $\theta$. The ball contacts the ring walls smoothly. A uniform magnetic field $B$ is directed vertically upward. By some mechanism, the ring moves persistently at a constant speed $u=3qBR/4m$ to the right, perpendicular to the diameter $P_1OP_2$. Initially, the ball is at $P_2$ and has a horizontal initial velocity to the right relative to the ring. For certain values of the initial speed, the ball will experience zero normal force $N=0$ at some angular positions during its subsequent motion. Correspondingly, the magnitude of the normal force $N$ at $\theta=3\pi/2$ will also vary. Determine the maximum of these $N$, denoted $N_{\max}$.

The picture shows the solution process of a physics competition tutoring problem. The upper part analyzes the Lorentz force on the ball in the ring, including force decomposition, setting a gravity‑like potential, and deriving the mechanical energy conservation condition. Below are two diagrams: on the left, a force diagram of the ball; on the right, an illustration with formulas. At the bottom, there is the name of the summer physics competition tutoring class exchange test in 2010 and the page number.
problem_answer: 小球在圆环系中的最大相对初速度为$v_{0,\max}=\dfrac{\sqrt{13}qBR}{2m}$，对应在$\theta=3\pi/2$处，环壁对小球的最大作用力为$N_{\max}=\dfrac{2\sqrt{\pi}q^{2}B^{2}}{4}\dfrac{m}{m}$。
